# mihari_policy (Data Source)

Reads a single Mihari alert policy by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mihari_policy" "example" {
  id = "existing-policy-uuid"
}

output "policy_name" {
  value = data.mihari_policy.example.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID of the policy.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `retry_count` (Number)
- `retry_delay` (Number)
- `steps` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--steps))
- `type` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--steps"></a>
### Nested Schema for `steps`

Read-Only:

- `call` (Boolean)
- `email` (Boolean)
- `members` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--steps--members))
- `push_notification` (Boolean)
- `sms` (Boolean)
- `wait_before` (Number)

<a id="nestedatt--steps--members"></a>
### Nested Schema for `steps.members`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `type` (String)
